---
title: "Page 2 - Interactive Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec05-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec05"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Interactive learning

_A brief explanation of the interactive task or tool to orient the learner._

---

## Try it

_Insert your interactive component here (e.g., a simulation, clickable diagram, or embedded JS activity)._

---

## Instructions

_Provide clear guidance on how to use the interactive element._

---

## What to notice

_Call out 2-3 specific features, trends, or behaviors the learner should pay attention to while interacting._

---

## Follow-up

_Add an optional reflection, interpretation, or next-step prompt for after the interaction is completed._

---





---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set up the decision-making scenario or situation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.decision-checkpoint}
**Decision Moment**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the situation and the immediate challenge or choice being faced._]

**What would you do next?**
1. Option A
2. Option B
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Rationale and Considerations**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for each option._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Briefly explain the consequences or provide a transition to the next topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this mcq._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="mcq"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the mcq format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Video Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Text Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
